export default function buildMediaQuery(screens) { screens = Array.isArray(screens) ? screens : [screens] return screens .map((screen) => { let values = screen.values.map((screen) => { if (screen.raw !== undefined) { return screen.raw } return [ screen.min && `(min-width: ${screen.min})`, screen.max && `(max-width: ${screen.max})`, ] .filter(Boolean) .join(' and ') }) return screen.not ? `not all and ${values}` : values }) .join(', ') }
